🏆 Professional Tier ($499-999/month)


Premium data with real-time monitoring and proprietary signals.

Data Sources:
  1. Experian Business Credit API
    • Comprehensive credit reports, bankruptcy alerts
    • Real-time credit monitoring
    • Cost: ~$2-5 per report

  1. ZoomInfo/Apollo.io
    • Technographic data, contact databases
    • Hiring velocity, funding rounds
    • Cost: Annual contract ($10k+/year)

  1. S&P Capital IQ
    • Financial statements, M&A activity
    • Industry benchmarks
    • Cost: Enterprise licensing

  1. Preqin/PitchBook
    • Private equity funding, valuations
    • Investor relationships
    • Cost: Annual contract ($15k+/year)
